title: Better End Portal Recipe
description: Craft the end portal! Vanilla & Survival Friendly!
body:
**End Portal Recipe** simplifies your journey to the End by providing a crafting recipe for the End Portal Frame. This mod allows players to create their own End Portals without having to search for strongholds, making it easier to access the End dimension and take on the Ender Dragon.
![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

![end portal recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7068150f7e797b4dadb1b7a05a7ddaa6fc8f4c5a.png)

Features:

**Craftable End Portal Frame**: Adds a crafting recipe for the End Portal Frame block, allowing players to create End Portals anywhere in their world.

**Balanced Recipe**: The crafting recipe is designed to be challenging and resource-intensive to maintain game balance and the significance of reaching the End.

**Survival Friendly**: Fully functional in survival mode, enabling players to access the End dimension without relying on strongholds.

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

![end portal frame](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/03f844b16f6f84ccf54a2f351cc6f2e1ff31b883.webp)


![intelij](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f981cdb0f9bd8d718bf44ee4eb86d402e673891.png)

This mod have been created with IntelliJ

#AD
